minutes_briefs.title: BC court filing fees increase May 4, 2026 — Small Claims and Supreme Court
minutes_briefs.summary: The BC government has increased filing fees for both Small Claims Court and Supreme Court Civil cases. These changes take effect on May 4, 2026. For Small Claims, the fee to start a claim (file a notice of claim) goes from $80 to $100, and the fee to file a reply (respond to a claim) goes from $60 to $105. Other Small Claims fees also rise, including a fee for certain documents (from $75 to $100) and a per-page photocopy fee (from $0.50 to $0.65). For Supreme Court Civil cases, fees for starting a proceeding (filing a notice of civil claim) go from $140 to $170, and fees for filing a response (filing a response to civil claim) go from $85 to $105. Several other Supreme Court fees also increase, including fees for filing applications and other documents.
minutes_briefs.action_required: Update your budget and any client invoices to reflect the new court filing fees starting May 4, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC court fee increases take effect

minutes_briefs.industries: Professional Services, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Construction & Development
minutes_briefs.source_body:
Regulation: B.C. Reg. 31/2026
Made under: Court Rules Act
Published in: No. 5 – B.C. Regs. 29 to 42, March 24, 2026
Deposit date: March 13, 2026

B.C. Reg. 31/2026, deposited March 13, 2026, under theCOURT RULES ACT[section 1]. Order in Council 74/2026, approved and ordered March 13, 2026. On the recommendation of the undersigned, the Lieutenant Governor, by and with the advice and consent of the Executive Council, orders that, effective May 4, 2026, (a)	the Small Claims Rules, B.C. Reg. 261/93, are amended as set out in the attached Schedule 1, and (b)	the Supreme Court Civil Rules, B.C. Reg. 168/2009, are amended as set out in the attached Schedule 2. — N. SHARMA,Attorney General and Deputy Premier; S. MALCOLMSON,Presiding Member of the Executive Council. 1	The Small Claims Rules, B.C. Reg. 261/93, are amended in Schedule A (a)	in item 17, in the column entitled "($)" opposite paragraph (a), by striking out "80" and substituting "100", (b)	in item 17, in the column entitled "($)" opposite paragraph (b), by striking out "60" and substituting "105", (c)	in item 18, in the column entitled "($)" opposite paragraph (a), by striking out "75" and substituting "100", (d)	in item 18, in the column entitled "($)" opposite paragraph (b), by striking out "55" and substituting "105", and (e)	in item 19, in the column entitled "($)", by striking out "0.50" and substituting "0.65". 1	The Supreme Court Civil Rules, B.C. Reg. 168/2009, are amended in Schedule 2 to Appendix C (a)	in item 3, in the column entitled "Fee ($)" opposite paragraph (a), by striking out "140" and substituting "170", (b)	in item 3, in the column entitled "Fee ($)" opposite paragraph (b), by striking out "85" and substituting "105", (c)	in item 4, in the column entitled "Fee ($)" opposite paragraph (a), by striking out "175" and substituting "170", (d)	in item 4, in the column entitled "Fee ($)" opposite paragraph (b), by striking out "75" and substituting "105", (e)	in item 5, in the column entitled "Fee ($)" opposite paragraph (a), by striking out "150" and substituting "170", (f)	in item 5, in the column entitled "Fee ($)" opposite paragraph (b), by striking out "70" and substituting "105", (g)	in item 6, in the column entitled "Fee ($)" opposite paragraph (a), by striking out "175" and substituting "170", (h)	in item 6, in the column entitled "Fee ($)" opposite paragraph (b), by striking out "75" and substituting "105", and
